## Distribution and Setup Instructions
Download llm-privacy-guard.zip.

### You can Installs it on Edge or Chrome 
1. Unzip to a folder (e.g., C:\Extensions\llm-privacy-guard)  
2. Go to edge://extensions  
3. Turn on Developer mode  
4. Click Load unpacked
5. Select the unzipped folder

### Notes
They must keep the folder (Edge loads from disk; don’t delete it).  
Updates = send new zip; they replace folder and click Reload.
